title: 2D Impaled
description: 2D models/textures for the impaled tridents! (w/ mod pommel and unofficial impaled 1.20.1)
body:
### WARNING:
RESOURCEPACK WON'T WORK UNLESS YOU'RE USING THE MOD "[Pommel - Held Item Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models)"

ONLY WORKS WITH THE UNOFFICIAL 1.20.1 PORT OF IMPALED

I already did the description for this before but I clicked somewhere and it deleted everything. I hate my life.

ANYWAYS- yeah, 2D models/textures for impaled (works in hand and arsenal backslot, but thrown tridents look the same. I relly trid). I had this thing collecting dust in an old modpack so I decided to polish it up a bit and upload it here. enjoy!

oh also, the atlan texture was made by [Azverial](https://modrinth.com/user/Azverial) and they were inside arsenal assets. sorry if I'm using them without asking, and if you or RAT see this and want me to take it down I'll do it

anyways, enough yapping. NOW enjoy!
